ValidationRule.description: Prevents updates to PHOCS Inspection records when Status is Completed, unless the user has the EHIS Bypass Validation Rule custom permission.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "PHOCSInspection", NOT($Permission.EHISBypassValidationRuleCustomPermission), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, "Completed"), NOT(ISCHANGED(Status)) ), AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), "Completed") ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot edit this Inspection record once the Status is marked as Completed.
